headlines.h: Opinion: distorted cat (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: The meows are so cuteee😭😭
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Today I found out why our cat’s diet isn’t working; he goes to my 7 year old and pretends he hasn’t been fed."
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
